Preview:

The both of them had decided to visit their grunkles, Ford and Stan, for the summer. So, to the Mystery Shack they went. At the moment, they had already unpacked everything and was heading to the woods just to hike and talk. They had already caught up with their Grunkles and all that, so they might as well go into the woods like a couple of dumb kids again. Maybe they'll find something worthwhile.
